text: A song for those who go up to Jerusalem to worship the Lord. A psalm of David. How good and pleasant it is when God's people live together in peace!
It's like the special olive oil that was poured on Aaron's head. It ran down on his beard and on the collar of his robe.
It's as if the dew of Mount Hermon were falling on Mount Zion. There the Lord gives his blessing. He gives life that never ends.
